message:
fix(interactive): extend slash-command timeout for interactive custom UIs
and use dedicated shortcut budget for extension shortcuts

Interactive slash commands can host long-running custom UI overlays
(e.g., games, dashboards, configuration wizards) that may run for hours.
The previous timeout used the standard EXTENSION_EVENT_TIMEOUT_MS which
was far too short for these interactive sessions.

Changes:
- Add EXTENSION_INTERACTIVE_COMMAND_TIMEOUT_MS constant (24 hours) for
  slash-command execution, giving interactive extensions enough budget
  to run arbitrarily without timing out
- Switch shortcut execution from the generic event timeout to the
  dedicated EXTENSION_SHORTCUT_BUDGET_MS, which is purpose-built for
  keyboard-triggered extension shortcuts and has appropriate guardrails

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
